_doc: Project-scoped Claude Code settings shipped by servicenow-claude-kit. Hooks are SHARED across the team — keep them low-risk and skip-able. Per-developer overrides go in .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).

hooks.command: node -e "try { const { getCapability } = require('./scripts/lib/capability-report'); const dict = getCapability('table_api.sys_dictionary_writable'); const scope = getCapability('execute_script.runs_global_scope'); if (scope === false) { process.stderr.write('[capability] WARN: execute_script runs in a SCOPED sandbox on this instance — sys_dictionary and other sys_* metadata writes will silently no-op. Use admin-basic-auth Table API PATCH for metadata edits.\n'); } if (dict === false) { process.stderr.write('[capability] WARN: table_api.sys_dictionary_writable=false — the Table API metadata-PATCH path is ALSO failing on this instance. Metadata mutation currently has no verified working path; probe again with npm run probe:full before assuming a write landed.\n'); } } catch (e) {}"
